name: Demonic Aura Nine-Sword Style Asura Demon Nine Flash

issues.description: Rest action has incorrect minCost constraint. Card text requires 'cost of 3 or more' (minCost: 3), not maxCost.

Rest action targeting opponent's character should be conditional ('If you do'). Current structure does not reflect the conditional chain: rest own character → IF successful, then rest opponent's character.
Second trigger block with 'Trigger' is unexplained and does not match card text. Card describes a single sequence of actions, not a separate triggered effect. This appears to be erroneous.
Opponent character rest has maxCost: 5, but DSL shows maxCost: 4 in effects[1]. Inconsistency—card text clearly states '5 or less'.
